title: Raccoon Removal in Prospect Lefferts Gardens, Brooklyn
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Prospect Lefferts Gardens, Brooklyn. Safe, humane wildlife control for homes and buildings. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Prospect Lefferts Gardens, where tree-lined streets and historic homes provide ideal nesting sites in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Our professional raccoon removal services protect your Brooklyn property from structural damage, health hazards, and ongoing wildlife intrusions. Best Pest Control NYC offers humane, effective raccoon removal solutions tailored to Prospect Lefferts Gardens residents.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in Brooklyn wildlife removal with over 15 years of experience serving Prospect Lefferts Gardens and surrounding neighborhoods. Our licensed technicians provide same-day emergency response, humane trapping methods, complete exclusion services, and warranties that ensure raccoons won't return to your property.
localContext: Prospect Lefferts Gardens' beautiful Victorian and brownstone homes near Prospect Park create attractive habitats for raccoons seeking shelter and food sources. The neighborhood's mature trees, proximity to the park, and older building structures with accessible entry points make professional raccoon exclusion and removal especially important for local homeowners.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Prospect Lefferts Gardens?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Prospect Lefferts Gardens typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring sealing, and extent of damage repair needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Prospect Lefferts Gardens?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Prospect Lefferts Gardens due to the neighborhood's proximity to Prospect Park, abundance of mature trees, and older homes with accessible attics and chimneys. Raccoons are especially active during spring when mothers seek safe nesting sites for their young.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Prospect Lefferts Gardens home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Prospect Lefferts Gardens for urgent raccoon situations. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on whether babies are present and how many raccoons need to be trapped. We use humane methods and ensure all animals are safely removed before sealing entry points.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to Brooklyn homes?
faqs.answer: Raccoons can cause extensive damage including torn insulation, chewed electrical wiring, damaged roof vents and soffits, destroyed ductwork, and contamination from feces and urine. They can also create serious health risks through parasites and diseases. Prompt professional removal minimizes damage and protects your family's health and your property value.
